method: Each report-page.jpg was visually inspected at original resolution. The collector's initial inactive-tab poster clips were black, so each poster.jpg was replaced by a deterministic 356x632 top-left crop of that same route's readable, same-run report-page.jpg and inspected again.

items.notes: Career report title and six-stage timeline are readable.
Relationship report title and five-stage timeline are readable.
Education report title, summary and four-stage timeline are readable.
Venture report title, mortgage reference and five-stage timeline are readable.
Mortality report title and timeline through age 100 are readable.
